{"command": "set -e
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"
SPEC_ID="fn-1-make-pr-plugin-smoke"
BASE_REF="main"
RALPH=0
AUTONOMOUS=0

# --- §0.2: resolve spec id (already given explicitly) ---
echo "SPEC_ID=$SPEC_ID"

# --- §0.3: base-branch detection cascade (already given via --base main) ---
if ! git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --verify --quiet "$BASE_REF" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Error: base ref '$BASE_REF' is not a valid git ref." >&2
  exit 1
fi
echo "BASE_REF=$BASE_REF valid"

# --- §0.4: branch validity ---
HEAD_SHA=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --verify HEAD 2>/dev/null) || {
  echo "Error: HEAD does not resolve to a commit." >&2; exit 1; }
BASE_SHA=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --verify "$BASE_REF" 2>/dev/null)

if [[ "$HEAD_SHA" == "$BASE_SHA" ]]; then
  echo "Error: HEAD and base ($BASE_REF) point at the same commit. Nothing to PR." >&2
  exit 1
fi

MERGE_BASE=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" merge-base "$BASE_REF" HEAD 2>/dev/null) || {
  echo "Error: HEAD and base ($BASE_REF) share no merge-base." >&2
  exit 1; }

COMMITS_AHEAD=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-list --count "$MERGE_BASE..HEAD")
if [[ "$COMMITS_AHEAD" -lt 1 ]]; then
  echo "Error: HEAD has 0 commits since merge-base with $BASE_REF." >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "HEAD_SHA=$HEAD_SHA"
echo "MERGE_BASE=$MERGE_BASE"
echo "COMMITS_AHEAD=$COMMITS_AHEAD"
CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" branch --show-current)
echo "CURRENT_BRANCH=$CURRENT_BRANCH""}

{"command": "set -e
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"
SPEC_ID="fn-1-make-pr-plugin-smoke"
BASE_REF="main"
RALPH=0
AUTONOMOUS=0

CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "")
echo "CURRENT_BRANCH=$CURRENT_BRANCH"
echo "SPEC_ID=$SPEC_ID (explicit arg)"

# --- §0.3: base-branch detection cascade (explicit --base main given) ---
if ! git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --verify --quiet "$BASE_REF" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Error: base ref '$BASE_REF' is not a valid git ref." >&2
  exit 1
fi
echo "BASE_REF=$BASE_REF (validated)"

# --- §0.4: branch validity ---
HEAD_SHA=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --verify HEAD 2>/dev/null) || {
  echo "Error: HEAD does not resolve to a commit." >&2; exit 1; }
BASE_SHA=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-parse --verify "$BASE_REF" 2>/dev/null)

if [[ "$HEAD_SHA" == "$BASE_SHA" ]]; then
  echo "Error: HEAD and base ($BASE_REF) point at the same commit. Nothing to PR." >&2
  exit 1
fi

MERGE_BASE=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" merge-base "$BASE_REF" HEAD 2>/dev/null) || {
  echo "Error: HEAD and base ($BASE_REF) share no merge-base." >&2
  exit 1; }

COMMITS_AHEAD=$(git -C "$REPO_ROOT" rev-list --count "$MERGE_BASE..HEAD")
echo "HEAD_SHA=$HEAD_SHA"
echo "BASE_SHA=$BASE_SHA"
echo "MERGE_BASE=$MERGE_BASE"
echo "COMMITS_AHEAD=$COMMITS_AHEAD"

if [[ "$COMMITS_AHEAD" -lt 1 ]]; then
  echo "Error: HEAD has 0 commits since merge-base with $BASE_REF." >&2
  exit 1
fi
echo "Phase 0.2-0.4 OK"
"}

fi
OPEN_TASKS=$(printf '%s' "$SPEC_JSON" | jq -r '[.tasks[]? | select(.status != "done") | .id] | join(", ")')

if [[ "$OPEN_COUNT" -gt 0 ]]; then

fi

# --- §0.6: existing-PR refusal ---

EXISTING=$(printf '%s' "$EXISTING_JSON" | jq -r '.url // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)
echo "EXISTING=$EXISTING"

if [[ -n "$EXISTING" ]]; then
  echo "Error: branch already has an OPEN pull request: $EXISTING" >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "Phase 0 complete — proceeding to Phase 1"
"}
